name: Azizul Islam
bio: Studying at Satkhira Polytechnic Institute, currently in 7th semester. Passionate about mobile app development and always learning new things in tech. A simple, kind-hearted person who believes in honest hard work.

interactions.note: Profile created

name: Arif Hossain
bio: Met in BUET during freshman year. We used to pull all-nighters together before exams. Now he works at a tech startup in Dhaka.

interactions.note: Caught up after a long time
Sent him a meme, he laughed
Had tea near Dhanmondi lake

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: My team lead at my first internship. She taught me how to write clean code and handle client pressure. Still my go-to person for career advice.

interactions.note: Asked for career advice on new offer
She called to check in on my progress
Had lunch near office in Gulshan

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Grew up on the same street in Sylhet. We played cricket every afternoon after school. He moved to Chittagong but we still talk regularly.

interactions.note: Talked about his new job in Chittagong
Wished him on his birthday
Video called during Eid holidays

name: Priya Sharma
bio: We worked on our final year thesis together on machine learning. She is now doing her Masters in Canada. Time zones make it hard but she is worth the effort.

interactions.note: Caught up over Google Meet, she loves Canada
She shared her research paper draft
Called to celebrate her admission news

name: Sabbir Islam
bio: Colleague turned best friend. We bond over bad coffee and good memes at the office. Our Friday lunch hangouts are sacred.

interactions.note: Friday lunch at the usual spot
Sent the funniest meme of the week
Discussed the new project deadline

name: Mehnaz Akter
bio: Part of our five-person study group in college. She has a gift for explaining complex topics simply. Now she teaches at a private university.

interactions.note: She shared her lecture notes on algorithms
Met at a faculty seminar in Dhaka
Discussed old college memories

name: Rakib Hasan
bio: Best friend from Class 6 through SSC. We drifted apart after different colleges but every reunion feels like no time passed at all.

interactions.note: Randomly called, talked for two hours
Sent an old school photo found in an album
Met during Eid reunion at his place

name: Lamia Chowdhury
bio: We met at a local book club two years ago and instantly clicked over our love for Humayun Ahmed novels. She brings homemade food every time we meet.

interactions.note: Book club meeting, discussed Himu series
She recommended a new Bangladeshi novel
Talked about the book fair visit plan

name: Fahim Uddin
bio: My roommate for three years during university. We survived exam stress, power cuts, and terrible hostel food together. He is like a brother to me.

interactions.note: He called complaining about his new apartment
Video called, showed me his new place
Had biriyani at Fakruddin together

name: Sumaiya Begum
bio: A family friend who guided me through my early career decisions. She has been in the industry for 15 years and always gives honest, no-nonsense advice.

interactions.note: Asked for advice on salary negotiation
Family dinner at her house in Mirpur
She sent an article on career growth

name: Imran Hossain
bio: We joined the same company on the same day. Shared every confused first-week moment together. Now we sit across from each other and still chat all day.

interactions.note: Had lunch together at office canteen
Shared a funny work meme
Discussed office politics over call

name: Ruksana Parvin
bio: We bonded over late night tea sessions in the university common room. She now works at an NGO in Cox's Bazar doing incredible humanitarian work.

interactions.note: She sent photos from Cox's Bazar beach
Long catch-up over video call
Talked about her field work experiences

name: Shafiul Alam
bio: We were inseparable in primary school. Used to trade cricket cards every day. Now he runs a small business in Narayanganj and is doing really well.

interactions.note: Talked about his new business expansion
Shared old cricket card photo
Met at a mutual friend's wedding in Narayanganj

name: Tania Islam
bio: She was the most disciplined person in our study group. Always had color-coded notes. She now works as a data analyst at a bank in Dhaka.

interactions.note: She shared a data science resource
Talked about switching careers to tech
Coffee at a cafe in Banani

name: Nazmul Karim
bio: My next door neighbor for seven years. We watch football matches together every week. He is the most loyal friend I have in the neighborhood.

interactions.note: Watched Champions League match together
Argued about Messi vs Ronaldo again
Called to discuss weekend plans

name: Farzana Haque
bio: Senior engineer who mentored me during my first real project at work. She has a rare ability to make even the most complex problems feel approachable.

interactions.note: She gave feedback on my side project
She sent a useful GitHub repo link
Met at a tech meetup in Dhaka

name: Zahir Uddin
bio: Our families have been close for two decades. We grew up eating at each other's houses every Eid. Life got busy but the bond never fades.

interactions.note: Met at his sister's wedding
Called to catch up after months
Sent Eid greetings

name: Mithila Roy
bio: We built our first web app together during a university hackathon and won third place. She is now a UX designer at a product company in Dhaka.

interactions.note: She shared her new UI portfolio
Discussed a freelance collab opportunity
Video called to review her design work

name: Abir Chowdhury
bio: We met at a college debate competition and have been arguing about everything ever since in the best possible way. He is now a journalist in Dhaka.

interactions.note: Debated about the current political climate
He shared his latest published article
Had tea at Nilkhet book market

name: Sadia Sultana
bio: We sat next to each other from Class 4 to Class 8. She used to help me with Bangla essays and I helped her with math. Now she is a doctor in Rajshahi.

interactions.note: Video called, she looked exhausted from night shifts
Sent her a care package tracking update
Talked about old school memories

name: Rezaul Islam
bio: We bonded during a company offsite trip to Sylhet. Since then we grab tea every morning before standup. Reliable, calm, and always has good advice.

interactions.note: Morning tea before standup as usual
Sent a motivational message before his presentation
Discussed team dynamics at work

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We met volunteering at a local flood relief camp three years ago. Since then she has been one of my most thoughtful and consistent friends.

interactions.note: Helped her plan a charity event
She sent a thank you note after the event
Planned next volunteer activity together

name: Kawsar Mahmud
bio: Second year roommate who introduced me to programming beyond just assignments. We built silly projects together at 2am. He now works at a fintech in Singapore.

interactions.note: Long video call, he showed me his Singapore apartment
Sent him a GitHub repo that reminded me of our old projects
Called on his work anniversary
